llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Regional Compliance/Legal Intern
jobs.description: Objectives : We are looking for a legal and compliance intern who will provide a wide range of paralegal support as well as compliance / legal support in order to effectively facilitate daily operations of Regional / China Compliance team. The candidate should be proactive and diligent and understand business and operation needs of the organization. S/he should be detail oriented and excited to work collaboratively in an excellent compliance and legal team. Main Tasks: - Support regional compliance daily operation in Asia Pacific, including various compliance program / initiatives on compliance trainings, compliance campaign, data protection, etc. coordinate on feedback collection, consolidation, maintain paper filing and e-filing from various countries in Asia Pacific and manage the data up to date. - Conduct legal research, case analysis and summary, draft and / or review contracts, translate and / or proof-read le compliance documents, etc. - Support the preparation of high-profile compliance case investigation upon assignment. - Schedule appointments, make arrangement for meetings, workshops, event, etc. - Support other administrative tasks assigned. Requirements: - Education:

jobs.title: Legal Intern
jobs.description: Objectives: We are looking for a legal intern who will provide a wide range of administrative and secretarial support as well as legal support in order to effectively facilitate daily operations of China Legal team. Job Descriptions: • Track new legislations, conduct Legal research on various legal topics and draft legal memos • Translate and proof-read bilingual legal documents • Draft, review basic contracts and other legal documents • Schedule appointments, make arrangement for meetings, workshops, etc • Assist in preparing charts, meeting minutes and presentation slides and other materials for China Legal team • Collect, summarize and consolidate relevant business and legal data into reports, and establish and maintain paper filing and e-filing systems for China Legal team • Provide support with general guidance on a variety of legal projects and activities • Support other paralegal and administrative tasks assigned by Vice President, Team Leaders or Counsels in Legal Department Job Requirements: • Education: Student with legal education background, major in law preferable • Working Experience: Not required • Technical Professional Knowledge: Fluent in both oral and written Eng
